title: Veeva Pulse Uncovers Field Medical Engagement Drives 1.5x Increase in Treatment Adoption
text: Opportunity for broader impact as 70% of key opinion leaders interact with only one biopharma PLEASANTON, Calif., July 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today revealed findings of field medical's impact on clinical practice in the Veeva Pulse Field Trends Report.

title: Veeva Systems: Cloud Dominance Counters Competition
text: Veeva Systems (VEEV) is a premier provider of cloud solutions for the global life sciences industry, covering R&D to commercialization. Despite potential competition from Salesforce and high valuation ratios, Veeva remains a promising investment due to its robust profitability and resilience to macroeconomic changes. Investors should monitor Veeva's Q2 earnings and management's commentary on sales cycles and R&D spending to evaluate the company's future prospects.

title: Merck KGaA, Darmstadt, Germany Partners with Veeva to Transform Medical Information Operations Globally
text: Streamlines end-to-end inquiry management at scale with Veeva Vault MedInquiry PLEASANTON, Calif. , July 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today announced that Merck KGaA, Darmstadt, Germany is using Veeva Vault MedInquiry as its global medical information management system.

title: Veeva Systems (VEEV) Recently Broke Out Above the 20-Day Moving Average
text: From a technical perspective, Veeva Systems (VEEV) is looking like an interesting pick, as it just reached a key level of support. VEEV recently overtook the 20-day moving average, and this suggests a short-term bullish trend.

title: St. Cloud State University and Veeva Partner to Deliver Real-World Clinical Technology Experience to Medtech Students
text: University incorporating Veeva Vault eTMF into Applied Clinical Research Program ST. CLOUD, Minn.

title: Veeva Systems: Richly Priced For What It Offers
text: Veeva Systems Inc.'s growth-oriented shareholder base has largely exited the stock, leading to a more thoughtful investor base focused on the company's profitability margins. Despite its strong financial position with no debt and ample cash reserves, Veeva Systems stock is currently priced at a multiple of 31x forward non-GAAP operating margins. All in all, I'm neutral on Veeva Systems stock.

title: Here's Why Veeva Systems' Stock Rose 19% in June
text: Veeva reported earnings showing slow revenue growth and reduced operating profits. These results still exceeded Wall Street's forecasts on the top and bottom lines.

title: Why Veeva Systems Is a Top Pick for Investors in 2023
text: Despite a strong long-term opportunity, a slowing economy could hurt the company's near-term prospects. Veeva's revenue growth should improve when the funding environment for smaller biotech companies improves.
